audio_tip: Turn this on if the model supports audio recognition.
channel_priority_tip: The higher the priority channel, the easier it is to be requested
confirm_delete_channel: Confirm the deletion of the [{{name}}] channel?
mapping_tip:
A valid Json is required. 
The model can be mapped when sending a request to the actual address. 
For example:
{
  
  "gpt-4o": "gpt-4o-test"

}

When FastGPT requests the gpt-4o model, the gpt-4o-test model is sent to the actual address, instead of gpt-4o.
rerank_max_token_tip: Token limit per rerank request (query + single document). Documents exceeding the limit will be automatically split.
max_temperature_tip: If the model temperature parameter is not filled in, it means that the model does not support the temperature parameter.
model_permission_config_hint: If no collaborators are added, all members are available by default
select_model_placeholder: Select the model available under this channel
test_failed: There are {{num}} models that report errors
vlm_model_tip: Automatically labels images in documents and generates text descriptions to assist text retrieval
video_tip: Turn this on if the model supports video recognition.
model.alias_tip: The name of the model displayed in the system is convenient for users to understand.
model.censor_tip: If sensitive verification is required, turn on this switch
model.charsPointsPrice_tip: Combine the model input and output for Token billing. If the language model is configured with input and output billing separately, the input and output will be calculated separately.
model.defaultConfig_tip: Each request will carry this additional Body parameter.
model.default_config_tip:
When initiating a conversation request, merge this configuration. 
For example:
"""
{
   "temperature": 1,
   "max_tokens": null
}
"""
model.rerank_default_config_tip:
Merge this config when sending rerank requests. 
For example:
"""
{
   "topn": 5
}
"""
model.default_system_chat_prompt_tip: When the model talks, it will carry this default prompt word.
model.default_token_tip: The length of the default text block of the index model must be less than the maximum length above
model.function_call_tip:
If the model supports function calling, turn on this switch. 
Tool calls have higher priority.
model.input_price_tip: Language model input price. If this item is configured, the model comprehensive price will be invalid.
model.json_config_confirm: Confirm to use this configuration for override?
model.json_config_tip:
Configure the model through the configuration file. After clicking Confirm, the entered configuration will be used for full coverage. Please ensure that the configuration file is entered correctly. 
It is recommended to copy the current configuration file for backup before operation.
model.model_id_tip: The unique identifier of the model, that is, the value of the actual request to the service provider model, needs to correspond to the model in the OneAPI channel.
model.normalization_tip:
If the Embedding API does not normalize vector values, the switch can be enabled and the system will normalize.

Unnormalized APIs, which are represented by the vector search score greater than 1.
model.output_price_tip: The language model output price. If this item is configured, the model comprehensive price will be invalid.
model.price_tier_max_required: All tiers except the last one need an upper bound
model.price_tier_prev_range_required: Complete the previous tier upper bound first
model.price_tier_price_required: Each price tier needs at least an input or output price
model.price_tier_range_invalid: Invalid price tier range. Please make sure upper bounds keep increasing
model.price_tiers_tip: Match a tier by input token range, then bill input and output tokens with that tier's prices. Each next range starts after the previous upper bound. Leave the last upper bound empty to mean and above.
model.reasoning_tip: For example, Deepseek-reasoner can output the thinking process.
model.request_auth_tip: When making a request to a custom request address, carry the request header: Authorization: Bearer xxx to make the request.
model.request_url_tip:
If this value is filled in, a request will be made directly to this address without going through the configuration of the model channel.

The interface needs to follow OpenAI’s API format and fill in the complete request address, for example:

LLM: {{host}}/v1/chat/completions
Embedding: {{host}}/v1/embeddings
STT: {{host}}/v1/audio/transcriptions
TTS: {{host}}/v1/audio/speech
Rerank: {{host}}/v1/rerank
model.test_mode_tip: When enabled, the model will have a Beta logo added when selected.
model.tool_choice_tip: If the model supports tool calling, turn on this switch
model.vision_tip: If the model supports image recognition, turn on this switch.
model.embedding_vision_tip: Enable this when the embedding model can accept image input for image vector indexing and image search.
